name: Cher (France)
description: A blue field strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis, debruised by a white wavy fess, the whole within a red border.
history: The blue field semé of fleurs-de-lis is the arms of the old province of Berry, the wavy bar evoking the river Cher.

features.role: blue field semé of gold fleurs-de-lis
white wavy fess across the field
